**Real parallax depth:**
- **Hero** — large italic "Sidd" ghost text drifts upward at 0.5× scroll speed while the grid moves at 0.12×, content at 0.3× — three independent layers
- **Project scenes** — each project pins for 200vh; as you scroll through it, the big background number drifts up fast, the text meta drifts at medium speed, and the visual panel moves in the opposite direction — genuine foreground/background separation
- **Floating chips** on project visuals drift independently at their own rates

**Scroll-driven motion:**
- Ticker text speed is tied to your scroll position
- Skill strip scrolls horizontally as you scroll down
- Large ghost words ("Builder", "Stack") drift through section backgrounds

**Visual richness:**
- DM Serif Display (italic) for headlines — editorial feel
- Custom SVG mock UIs for both projects (phone UI for SwipeStyle, desktop app for Mugger Simulator)
- Animated cursor with ring that lags behind
- Stat numbers animate in from the right as you scroll into About

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>Sidd Sanagala</title>
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" />
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin />
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Serif+Display:ital@0;1&family=DM+Sans:opsz,wght@9..40,300;9..40,400;9..40,500&family=DM+Mono:wght@300;400&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />
  <style>
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

    :root {
      --bg: #07070f;
      --text: #e4e4ee;
      --muted: #55556a;
      --accent: oklch(0.65 0.22 262);
      --accent2: oklch(0.62 0.18 195);
      --serif: 'DM Serif Display', serif;
      --sans: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
      --mono: 'DM Mono', monospace;
    }

    html { scroll-behavior: auto; }
    body {
      background: var(--bg);
      color: var(--text);
      font-family: var(--sans);
      overflow-x: hidden;
    }

    /* ─── CURSOR ─── */
    #cursor {
      position: fixed;
      width: 8px; height: 8px;
      background: var(--accent);
      border-radius: 50%;
      pointer-events: none;
      z-index: 9999;
      transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
      transition: width 0.3s, height 0.3s, background 0.3s;
      mix-blend-mode: screen;
    }
    #cursor-ring {
      position: fixed;
      width: 36px; height: 36px;
      border: 1px solid oklch(0.65 0.22 262 / 0.4);
      border-radius: 50%;
      pointer-events: none;
      z-index: 9998;
      transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
      transition: width 0.4s, height 0.4s, opacity 0.3s;
    }
    body:has(a:hover) #cursor { width: 16px; height: 16px; }
    body:has(a:hover) #cursor-ring { width: 56px; height: 56px; opacity: 0.3; }

    /* ─── NAV ─── */
    nav {
      position: fixed;
      top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
      z-index: 100;
      padding: 28px 56px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      mix-blend-mode: normal;
    }
    nav::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(7,7,15,0.9), transparent);
      pointer-events: none;
      opacity: 0;
      transition: opacity 0.4s;
    }
    nav.scrolled::before { opacity: 1; }
    .nav-logo {
      font-family: var(--mono);
      font-size: 13px;
      color: var(--accent);
      letter-spacing: 0.08em;
      text-decoration: none;
    }
    .nav-right {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 40px;
    }
    .nav-links {
      display: flex;
      gap: 32px;
      list-style: none;
    }
    .nav-links a {
      font-size: 12px;
      font-weight: 400;
      color: var(--muted);
      text-decoration: none;
      letter-spacing: 0.1em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      transition: color 0.2s;
    }
    .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--text); }
    .nav-resume {
      font-size: 12px;
      font-family: var(--mono);
      color: var(--accent);
      text-decoration: none;
      border: 1px solid oklch(0.65 0.22 262 / 0.3);
      padding: 8px 18px;
      border-radius: 3px;
      transition: background 0.2s, border-color 0.2s;
    }
    .nav-resume:hover {
      background: oklch(0.65 0.22 262 / 0.1);
      border-color: var(--accent);
    }

    /* ─── HERO ─── */
    #hero {
      position: relative;
      height: 100vh;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    /* Parallax bg layers */
    .hero-layer {
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      will-change: transform;
      pointer-events: none;
    }

    /* Glowing orb */
    .orb {
      position: absolute;
      border-radius: 50%;
      filter: blur(80px);
    }
    .orb-1 {
      width: 700px; height: 700px;
      top: -200px; left: -150px;
      background: radial-gradient(circle, oklch(0.65 0.22 262 / 0.12), transparent 70%);
    }
    .orb-2 {
      width: 500px; height: 500px;
      bottom: -100px; right: -100px;
      background: radial-gradient(circle, oklch(0.62 0.18 195 / 0.1), transparent 70%);
    }

    /* Grid */
    .hero-grid {
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      background-image:
        linear-gradient(oklch(0.65 0.22 262 / 0.04) 1px, transparent 1px),
        linear-gradient(90deg, oklch(0.65 0.22 262 / 0.04) 1px, transparent 1px);
      background-size: 64px 64px;
      mask-image: radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 80% at 50% 50%, black, transparent);
    }

    /* Hero large bg number */
    .hero-bg-text {
      position: absolute;
      font-family: var(--serif);
      font-size: clamp(200px, 28vw, 420px);
      font-style: italic;
      color: transparent;
      -webkit-text-stroke: 1px oklch(0.65 0.22 262 / 0.06);
      white-space: nowrap;
      top: 50%;
      left: 50%;
      transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
      user-select: none;
      letter-spacing: -0.04em;
      will-change: transform;
    }

    .hero-content {
      position: relative;
      z-index: 2;
      text-align: center;
    }

    .hero-eyebrow {
      font-family: var(--mono);
      font-size: 12px;
      color: var(--accent);
      letter-spacing: 0.2em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      margin-bottom: 28px;
      opacity: 0;
      animation: fadeIn 1s 0.5s forwards;
    }

    .hero-name {
      font-family: var(--serif);
      font-size: clamp(72px, 10vw, 148px);
      font-weight: 400;
      line-height: 0.95;
      letter-spacing: -0.03em;
      margin-bottom: 32px;
      overflow: hidden;
    }
    .hero-name-line {
      display: block;
      opacity: 0;
      transform: translateY(100%);
      animation: slideUp 0.9s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1) forwards;
    }
    .hero-name-line:nth-child(1) { animation-delay: 0.3s; }
    .hero-name-line:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.5s; color: var(--accent); font-style: italic; }

    .hero-desc {
      font-size: 16px;
      font-weight: 300;
      color: var(--muted);
      max-width: 440px;
      margin: 0 auto 48px;
      line-height: 1.7;
      opacity: 0;
      animation: fadeIn 1s 0.9s forwards;
    }

    .hero-cta {
      display: flex;
      gap: 20px;
      justify-content: center;
      opacity: 0;
      animation: fadeIn 1s 1.1s forwards;
    }
    .btn-solid {
      padding: 14px 32px;
      background: var(--accent);
      color: #fff;
      border: none;
      font-family: var(--sans);
      font-size: 14px;
      font-weight: 500;
      border-radius: 4px;
      text-decoration: none;
      transition: opacity 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
      letter-spacing: 0.02em;
    }
    .btn-solid:hover { opacity: 0.85; transform: translateY(-2px); }
    .btn-outline {
      padding: 14px 32px;
      background: transparent;
      color: var(--text);
      border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12);
      font-family: var(--sans);
      font-size: 14px;
      font-weight: 400;
      border-radius: 4px;
      text-decoration: none;
      transition: border-color 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
    }
    .btn-outline:hover { border-color: var(--accent); transform: translateY(-2px); }

    .hero-scroll-indicator {
      position: absolute;
      bottom: 48px;
      left: 56px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 16px;
      opacity: 0;
      animation: fadeIn 1s 1.4s forwards;
    }
    .scroll-line-v {
      width: 1px;
      height: 64px;
      background: linear-gradient(to bottom, var(--accent), transparent);
      animation: expandLine 2.5s ease-in-out infinite;
    }
    .scroll-label {
      font-family: var(--mono);
      font-size: 10px;
      color: var(--muted);
      letter-spacing: 0.18em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      writing-mode: vertical-rl;
    }

    /* ─── TICKER ─── */
    #ticker-wrap {
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
      border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
      border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
      padding: 18px 0;
      background: rgba(255,255,255,0.02);
    }
    #ticker-track {
      display: flex;
      gap: 0;
      white-space: nowrap;
      will-change: transform;
    }
    .ticker-item {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 32px;
      padding: 0 32px;
      font-family: var(--mono);
      font-size: 12px;
      color: var(--muted);
      letter-spacing: 0.12em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .ticker-dot {
      width: 4px; height: 4px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: var(--accent);
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }

    /* ─── ABOUT (PINNED) ─── */
    #about-scene {
      position: relative;
      height: 250vh;
    }
    #about-sticky {
      position: sticky;
      top: 0;
      height: 100vh;
      overflow: hidden;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
    }

    .about-bg-word {
      position: absolute;
      right: -40px;
      top: 50%;
      transform: translateY(-50%);
      font-family: var(--serif);
      font-style: italic;
      font-size: clamp(120px, 18vw, 260px);
      color: transparent;
      -webkit-text-stroke: 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.04);

  <script>
  (() => {
    // ─── CURSOR ───
    const cur = document.getElementById('cursor');
    const ring = document.getElementById('cursor-ring');
    let mx = 0, my = 0, rx = 0, ry = 0;
    window.addEventListener('mousemove', e => { mx = e.clientX; my = e.clientY; });
    function animCursor() {
      rx += (mx - rx) * 0.12;
      ry += (my - ry) * 0.12;
      cur.style.left = mx + 'px';
      cur.style.top = my + 'px';
      ring.style.left = rx + 'px';
      ring.style.top = ry + 'px';
      requestAnimationFrame(animCursor);
    }
    animCursor();

    // ─── NAV scroll ───
    const navbar = document.getElementById('navbar');
    window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
      navbar.classList.toggle('scrolled', window.scrollY > 50);
    }, { passive: true });

    // ─── TICKER setup ───
    const tickerItems = [
      'Full-Stack Development', 'Machine Learning', 'React Native', 'Node.js',
      'Computer Vision', 'TensorFlow', 'Docker & Azure', 'NUS Computer Science',
      'Mathematics', 'Quantitative Finance', 'Open to Internships'
    ];
    const track = document.getElementById('ticker-track');
    // duplicate 3x for seamless
    for (let r = 0; r < 3; r++) {
      tickerItems.forEach(t => {
        const el = document.createElement('span');
        el.className = 'ticker-item';
        el.innerHTML = `<span class="ticker-dot"></span>${t}<span class="ticker-dot"></span>`;
        track.appendChild(el);
      });
    }

    // ─── SKILL STRIP setup ───
    const stripSkills = [
      'Python','React','TypeScript','Node.js','TensorFlow','OpenCV',
      'Docker','PostgreSQL','Flask','Azure','Supabase','Stripe','GitHub Actions','Expo'
    ];
    const strip = document.getElementById('skill-strip');
    for (let r = 0; r < 4; r++) {
      stripSkills.forEach(s => {
        const el = document.createElement('span');
        el.className = 'strip-item';
        el.innerHTML = `<span class="strip-name">${s}</span><span class="strip-sep"></span>`;
        strip.appendChild(el);
      });
    }

    // ─── MAIN SCROLL DRIVER ───
    let scrollY = 0;
    let targetScroll = 0;

    // Get elements
    const heroLayer1 = document.getElementById('hero-layer-1');
    const heroLayer2 = document.getElementById('hero-layer-2');
    const heroBgText = document.getElementById('hero-bg-text');
    const heroContent = document.getElementById('hero-content');
    const aboutBgWord = document.getElementById('about-bg-word');
    const aboutScene = document.getElementById('about-scene');
    const skillsBgText = document.getElementById('skills-bg-text');

    // Project parallax elements
    const projNum1 = document.getElementById('proj-num-1');
    const projMeta1 = document.getElementById('proj-meta-1');
    const projVis1 = document.getElementById('proj-vis-1');
    const chip1a = document.getElementById('chip-1a');
    const chip1b = document.getElementById('chip-1b');
    const projNum2 = document.getElementById('proj-num-2');
    const projMeta2 = document.getElementById('proj-meta-2');
    const projVis2 = document.getElementById('proj-vis-2');
    const chip2a = document.getElementById('chip-2a');
    const chip2b = document.getElementById('chip-2b');
    const contactOrb = document.getElementById('contact-orb');

    function getSceneProgress(el, overscroll = 0) {
      const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      const vh = window.innerHeight;
      const start = rect.top - vh;
      const end = rect.bottom + overscroll;
      if (start > 0 || end < 0) return 0;
      return Math.max(0, Math.min(1, -start / (end - start)));
    }

    function getStickyProgress(scene) {
      const rect = scene.getBoundingClientRect();
      const sceneH = scene.offsetHeight;
      const vh = window.innerHeight;
      const scrolled = -rect.top;
      return Math.max(0, Math.min(1, scrolled / (sceneH - vh)));
    }

    function lerp(a, b, t) { return a + (b - a) * t; }

    function tick() {
      scrollY = window.scrollY;
      const vh = window.innerHeight;

      // ── HERO PARALLAX ──
      const heroProgress = Math.min(scrollY / vh, 1);
      heroLayer1.style.transform = `translateY(${scrollY * 0.25}px)`;
      heroLayer2.style.transform = `translateY(${scrollY * 0.12}px)`;
      heroBgText.style.transform = `translate(-50%, calc(-50% + ${scrollY * 0.5}px))`;
      heroBgText.style.opacity = 1 - heroProgress * 2;
      heroContent.style.transform = `translateY(${scrollY * 0.3}px)`;
      heroContent.style.opacity = 1 - heroProgress * 2;

      // ── TICKER (scroll-driven) ──
      const tickerW = track.scrollWidth / 3;
      const tickerOffset = (scrollY * 0.3) % tickerW;
      track.style.transform = `translateX(-${tickerOffset}px)`;

      // ── ABOUT BG WORD parallax ──
      const aboutTop = aboutScene.getBoundingClientRect().top;
      aboutBgWord.style.transform = `translateY(calc(-50% + ${aboutTop * -0.2}px))`;

      // ── SKILL STRIP (reverse scroll) ──
      const skillsEl = document.getElementById('skills-section');
      const skillsTop = skillsEl ? skillsEl.getBoundingClientRect().top : 0;
      const stripW = strip.scrollWidth / 4;
      const stripOffset = (scrollY * 0.18) % stripW;
      strip.style.transform = `translateX(-${stripOffset}px)`;

      // ── SKILLS BG TEXT ──
      const skillsCenter = skillsEl ? skillsEl.getBoundingClientRect().top + skillsEl.offsetHeight/2 - vh/2 : 0;
      skillsBgText.style.transform = `translate(-50%, calc(-50% + ${skillsCenter * 0.15}px))`;

      // ── PROJECT 1 PARALLAX ──
      const scene1 = document.getElementById('proj-scene-1');
      if (scene1) {
        const p = getStickyProgress(scene1);
        // Number drifts up faster
        projNum1.style.transform = `translateY(${lerp(40, -60, p)}px)`;
        projNum1.style.opacity = lerp(0.15, 0.04, p);
        // Meta drifts up slightly
        projMeta1.style.transform = `translateY(${lerp(20, -30, p)}px)`;
        // Visual drifts up slower (opposite direction = depth)
        projVis1.style.transform = `translateY(${lerp(-20, 20, p)}px)`;
        // Floating chips drift at their own speeds
        if (chip1a) chip1a.style.transform = `translate(${lerp(0, 8, p)}px, ${lerp(0, -20, p)}px)`;
        if (chip1b) chip1b.style.transform = `translate(${lerp(0, -6, p)}px, ${lerp(0, 16, p)}px)`;
      }

      // ── PROJECT 2 PARALLAX ──
      const scene2 = document.getElementById('proj-scene-2');
      if (scene2) {
        const p = getStickyProgress(scene2);
        projNum2.style.transform = `translateY(${lerp(40, -60, p)}px)`;
        projNum2.style.opacity = lerp(0.15, 0.04, p);
        projMeta2.style.transform = `translateY(${lerp(20, -30, p)}px)`;
        projVis2.style.transform = `translateY(${lerp(-20, 20, p)}px)`;
        if (chip2a) chip2a.style.transform = `translate(${lerp(0, 10, p)}px, ${lerp(0, -18, p)}px)`;
        if (chip2b) chip2b.style.transform = `translate(${lerp(0, -8, p)}px, ${lerp(0, 14, p)}px)`;
      }

      // ── CONTACT ORB mouse + scroll ──
      const contactRect = document.getElementById('contact-section').getBoundingClientRect();
      if (contactRect.top < vh && contactRect.bottom > 0) {
        const cy = contactRect.top + contactRect.height / 2 - vh / 2;
        contactOrb.style.transform = `translate(-50%, calc(-50% + ${cy * 0.3}px))`;
      }

      requestAnimationFrame(tick);
    }
    requestAnimationFrame(tick);

    // ─── SCROLL REVEAL (IntersectionObserver) ───
    const io = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
      entries.forEach(e => {
        if (e.isIntersecting) {
          e.target.classList.add('in');
        }
      });
    }, { threshold: 0.1, rootMargin: '0px 0px -60px 0px' });

    document.querySelectorAll('.scroll-reveal, .reveal-line, .about-stat, .exp-entry').forEach(el => io.observe(el));

    // Stagger about stats
    document.querySelectorAll('.about-stat').forEach((el, i) => {
      el.style.transitionDelay = `${i * 0.12}s`;
    });
    document.querySelectorAll('.exp-entry').forEach((el, i) => {
      el.style.transitionDelay = `${i * 0.1}s`;
    });
    document.querySelectorAll('.skill-col.scroll-reveal').forEach((el, i) => {
      el.style.transitionDelay = `${i * 0.08}s`;
    });

    // Smooth scroll for anchor links
    document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="#"]').forEach(a => {
      a.addEventListener('click', e => {
        const target = document.querySelector(a.getAttribute('href'));
        if (target) {
          e.preventDefault();
          window.scrollTo({ top: target.offsetTop, behavior: 'smooth' });
        }
      });
    });

  })();
  </script>

</body>
</html>
